results.title: Ghana must end the cycle where every high-profile investigation becomes political – CDD Fellow
results.description: Dr John Osae-Kwapong, a Fellow at the Centre for Democratic Development (CDD-Ghana), has urged Ghana to break the cycle where every investigation involving high-profile public figures is viewed through a political lens.

results.title: Marlborough delays Farm Venue Law after public concerns
results.description: A proposed local law regulating farm venue events remained under review Monday, July 13, after farmers and residents urged the Town Board to refine the legislation before adopting it. The ...

results.title: AG Nominee Blanch Hints At Reg Shift To Eliminate Telehealth Abortion
results.description: President Donald Trump’s nominee for attorney general is already plotting legal strategies to defend reinstituting in-person requirements to obtain mifepristone nationwide, eliminating telehealth abortion access, based on an anticipated independent FDA review of the abortion drug that, he hinted, will likely support a regulatory shift.

results.title: Argentina risks FIFA punishment for Falkland Islands flag during England win celebrations
results.description: Argentina is at risk of being sanctioned by FIFA after its players celebrated with a Falkland Islands banner following its semi-final win over England on Wednesday. After the team’s dramatic comeback victory at Mercedes-Benz Stadium, Atlanta, midfielder Giovani Lo Celso appeared on the field with a banner saying, “Las Malvinas son Argentinas,” which translates to “The Malvinas are Argentine.” Argentina is at risk of being sanctioned by FIFA after its players celebrated with a Falkland Islands banner following its semi-final win over England on Wednesday.
